Assignment For Session 10:
The Grand Offer
Create your own Grand Offer within your VSL template
(comes after your Bigger Solution section) by:
1. Downloading the Mind Map documents for Step 5 of the 5-
Step VSL Process, Parts 1-6, under the Downloads Tab in
the 5-Step VSL Process Module.
2. Downloading the Master Template (PowerPoint or Keynote)
and Master Template With Notes (PDF) under the
Downloads Tab in the 5-Step VSL Process Module.
3. Start with the Mind Map for Part 1, and watch Part 1’s video
while looking over the Mind Map. Pause the video
wherever necessary and, using the Mind Map and sample
Powerpoint/Keynote and/or PDF Master Template, create
Part 1 of your Grand Offer within the PowerPoint or
Keynote template, provided in the Downloads area.
4. Repeat this process for Parts 2-6, so you have a completed
PowerPoint (or Keynote) file for Step 5, The Grand Offer.
5. Open your Assignments for Steps 1-2 and Steps 3-4 of the
5-Step VSL Process (done in either PowerPoint or
Keynote).
6. Go to your Steps 1-2 PowerPoint (or Keynote) file.
7. “Save As” to create a new file, and give it a name fitting for
your final VSL (such as FinalVSL, or
PRODUCTNAME_VSL).

-- 1 of 2 --

8. Open your Steps 3-4 PowerPoint (or Keynote) file.
9. Select “Slide View”.
10. 	Place your mouse in the slides window, press
“Command+A” to select all the slides.
11. 	Go to your new (final VSL) file and select the last slide.
12. 	Press “Command+P” to paste the slides from Steps 3-4
underneath the last slide from Steps 1-2.
13. 	Repeat this process for Step 5’s slides, so you end up
with every slide you’ve created in your final VSL file.
You should now have your completed VSL in one file, ready to
record!

-- 2 of 2 --
